name: BEN_PER_BILL_INFO_F
description: BEN_PER_BILL_INFO_F contains information related to Benefits Billing Information and it stores common billing info for person.

columns.Name: PER_BILL_INFO_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.

columns.Name: PER_ACCT_NUM
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: STOP_BILL_FLAG
columns.Comments: This column indicates the stop billing is set to Y or N.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_LINE1
columns.Comments: This column indicates the first line of address.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_LINE2
columns.Comments: This column indicates the second line of address.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_LINE3
columns.Comments: This column indicates the third line of address.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_LINE4
columns.Comments: This column indicates the fourth line of address.

columns.Name: STATE
columns.Comments: This column indicates the state of address.

columns.Name: CITY
columns.Comments: This column indicates the city of address.

columns.Name: COUNTRY
columns.Comments: This column indicates the country of the address.

columns.Name: ZIP_CODE
columns.Comments: This column indicates the postal code of the address.

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: This column indicates the comments.

columns.Name: PRMRY_MAIL_ADDRESS_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ADDRESSES. Identifies which address from PER_ADDRESSES is considered the mailing address for the person.

columns.Name: PRMRY_EMAIL_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_EMAIL_ADDRESSES.

columns.Name: PREF_COMM_MODE
columns.Comments: For future use. Values could be email/ mail / fax etc.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Comments: Template number field for future use.
